select.heading: Compare the Statement
select.subtitle: Upload the other party's statement; the assistant compares it line by line with your ledger and explains the differences.
select.step1: Select the statement file from the other party
select.step2: Let the assistant compare it with your records
select.step3: Add missing items to your ledger with one tap
select.uploadHint: Excel or CSV — ask the other party's accountant for an "Excel export"
select.formats: PDF and photos are not supported in this version
select.currencyNote: Comparison is done in {{currency}}. Results will be misleading if the statement uses a different currency.
select.invalidExtension: Unsupported file type. Please select an .xlsx, .xls or .csv file.
select.notLinked: Reconciliation is not yet supported for linked (shared) accounts.

errors.title: Could not read statement
errors.HEADER_NOT_FOUND: Date/Debit/Credit column headers were not found. Save the file as .xlsx in Excel and try again.
errors.EMPTY_FILE: No readable transaction rows in the file.
errors.READ_ERROR: The file could not be read or is corrupted.

verdict.mutabikDesc: Every record in this period matches exactly; opening and closing balances checked out too. Everything is in its place.
verdict.fark_aciklandi: There's a difference, but the cause is clear
verdict.fark_aciklandiDesc: The breakdown below pinpoints where the difference comes from. Follow the "What to do now" steps to close it.
verdict.bakiye_teyitsizDesc: The opening or closing balance could not be fully verified. Check the warnings below and make sure the file belongs to this contact.
verdict.mutabik_degilDesc: The difference isn't fully explained by the listed items. Review the mismatches and possible causes below; the problem may also be in older periods this statement doesn't cover.

openingDiff.title: Opening difference: {{amount}}
openingDiff.desc: There's a difference in your opening balance on {{date}}: you show {{ours}}, the other party shows {{theirs}} — the difference is {{yon}}. It comes from the period before {{date}}. Ask the other party for that period's statement and clear it up first.
openingDiff.baslangicDesc: The opening balance you entered on {{date}} ({{ours}}) doesn't match the other party's balance on that date ({{theirs}}) — the difference is {{yon}}. Either check your opening balance or look for a missing/extra entry before {{date}}. Do NOT enter a made-up entry to close the gap, it would pollute your income-expense reports. If you have no transactions yet, update the opening balance from the contact's detail page.

supheli.baslik: This statement may not belong to {{cari}}
supheli.govde: None of the {{count}} transactions in the uploaded statement matched your records.
supheli.nedenEski: It may be from a much older period (your records start on {{date}})
supheli.nedenBaskaCari: The statement may belong to a different contact
supheli.nedenBaslangic: Your opening balance may differ from theirs

causes.title: What could cause the difference?
items: An invoice or payment may be unrecorded on one side
A number may have an extra zero or a misplaced decimal (e.g. 5,000 instead of 500)
An entry's date may have the wrong year (e.g. 2026 instead of 2025)
Return invoices may be unrecorded on one side
The same entry may have been recorded twice (duplicate)
The difference may come from an older period this statement doesn't cover

mini.yapilamadi: Statement balance could not be verified (no opening row or balance column)
mini.gecmisKalem: The {{count}} statement items are covered by your opening balance, so they are not added to your ledger.
mini.duzeltYonlendirme: You can update it via the pencil icon on the "Opening Balance" card in the contact detail.

sinir.zincirNot: opening derived from the verified balance chain

kilit.grupNot: covered by your opening balance — cannot be added
kilit.tooltip: These items predate your record start — they are covered by your opening balance. Adding them would double-count your balance; if balances don't match, fix the opening balance instead.

dogrulama.isimOk: Contact name: "{{bulunan}}" found in the file
dogrulama.isimYok: Contact name: not found in the file header
dogrulama.antetYok: Contact name: no header text in file — check skipped
dogrulama.oranPasif: Item match: not enough records — skipped
dogrulama.donemYok: Period: does not overlap with your records
dogrulama.kirmiziBaslik: This file may not belong to {{cari}}
dogrulama.kirmiziGovde: Only {{eslesen}} of {{toplam}} items matched your records ({{oran}}%). You may have selected the wrong file.
dogrulama.kirmiziBant: Continuing with a low match rate — bulk add is disabled.
dogrulama.sariBant: Match rate is lower than expected ({{oran}}%). Make sure the file belongs to the right contact.

topluOnay.govde: {{count}} entries totaling {{amount}} will be added to your ledger. Items before your record start are not included.
topluOnay.tekilKirmizi: You are adding an item from a low-match file — double-check the amount and the contact. Continue?

summary.checksumTotalsYok: Couldn't check — the statement has no totals row
summary.checksumChainYok: Couldn't check — the statement has no balance column (or its direction was unreadable)
summary.postPeriodInfo: {{count}} more transactions after the statement period; today's balance differs from the statement closing. Current balance: {{amount}}

actions.title: What to do now
actions.baslangicDuzelt: Investigate the cause of the difference (a forgotten payment, an unrecorded invoice) — do not enter a made-up entry to close the gap; if you have no transactions yet, update the opening balance from the contact's detail page
actions.oncekiDonem: Request the previous period's statement from the other party
actions.oncekiDonemMesaj: Hello, for the account reconciliation could you please send us the statement for the period before {{start}}? Thank you.
actions.eksikEkle: Add the {{count}} items missing from your ledger
actions.yuvarlama: Close the {{amount}} rounding difference with a single adjustment entry
actions.paylas: Share the report with the other party's accountant

groups.bizdeEksikVerifyNot: Before adding, verify: were these invoices actually issued, and were the goods/services actually delivered? If unsure, ask the other party for proof (invoice/delivery note) — they may have recorded them by mistake or added extra ones.

musteri.credit: Your invoice — their purchase record (enter a sale)

tedarikci.debit: Invoice they issued to you (enter a purchase)
tedarikci.credit: Your payment to them (enter a payment)

rowHint.missingInTheirs: Our record — not visible in their statement

badges.aciklama_ipucu: May be an FX/due-date/price difference entry
badges.olasi_mukerrer: Possible duplicate — or the other party missed this delivery; check the delivery note

insights.title: Assistant Summary
insights.hic_eslesme: None of the transactions in this statement matched your records. Make sure the file belongs to the right contact and covers the period.
insights.fark_devirden: The transactions in this statement reconcile; the {{amount}} difference comes from the prior-period opening balance — so the problem is in the period before this statement.
insights.fark_borc_lehinize: {{cari}} shows your payable {{amount}} LOWER than your records — in your favor.
insights.fark_borc_aleyhinize: {{cari}} shows your payable {{amount}} HIGHER than your records — against you.
insights.fark_alacak_lehinize: {{cari}} shows your receivable {{amount}} HIGHER than your records — in your favor.
insights.fark_alacak_aleyhinize: {{cari}} shows your receivable {{amount}} LOWER than your records — against you.
insights.fark_gorunmeyen_donem: All transactions in this statement reconcile; yet a {{amount}} difference remains — it likely comes from an older period this statement doesn't cover. Check those periods, or ask the other party for a full/older statement.
insights.devir_tek_kalem: The opening difference exactly matches your {{amount}} entry dated {{date}}{{detay}} — the other party may not have recorded it; ask about this first.
insights.mukerrer_suphe: The {{amount}} entry dated {{date}} appears twice in your ledger but once in the statement — it may be a duplicate, or the other party may have missed the second delivery; check the delivery note.
insights.kurus_farki: {{count}} items have a net {{amount}} rounding difference — this can be settled with a single adjustment entry.
insights.olasi_ters_taraf: The {{amount}} entry dated {{date}} appears on both sides with OPPOSITE signs (debit on one, credit on the other). You may have booked it on the wrong side — e.g. a return as a sale, a payment as a collection. Check it.
insights.olasi_katsayi: One entry differs by {{count}}× between the two sides{{detay}} — a number may have an extra zero or a misplaced decimal.
insights.olasi_yil_hatasi: Your {{amount}} entry dated {{date}} has a twin exactly one year earlier/later in the statement — you may have entered the wrong year.
insights.donem_sonrasi: Your ledger has {{count}} more transactions after the statement period; the comparison uses balances as of the statement's end date.

koprusu.title: Difference breakdown
koprusu.devirBilinmiyor: Opening difference: could not be verified (no opening row in statement)
koprusu.dogrulandi: The equation balances — the difference is fully explained ✓
koprusu.dogrulanamadi: Warning: the listed items do not fully explain the difference

warnings.title: Warnings
warnings.atlanan_satirlar: {{count}} rows could not be read and were skipped — results may be incomplete
warnings.karma_satir_netlendi: {{count}} rows had both debit and credit; reduced to net amount
warnings.negatif_tutar_cevrildi: {{count}} negative amounts were moved to the opposite column
warnings.tip_uyumsuz_islemler: {{count}} transactions have a type inconsistent with this contact (still included)
warnings.devir_satiri_yok: No opening-balance row in the statement — opening balance could not be verified
warnings.bakiye_isareti_cozulemedi: Balance column direction (D/C) could not be resolved; the column was ignored
warnings.aynasiz_yon: This statement appears to be written from your perspective; the comparison was adjusted accordingly
warnings.dusuk_eslesme: Very low match rate — debit/credit direction or currency may not match
warnings.ekstre_ici_tutarsiz: The statement appears internally inconsistent (totals/balance checks failed)
warnings.fark_aciklanamiyor: The listed differences do not fully explain the closing difference — review carefully
warnings.donem_sonrasi_islemler: {{count}} transactions exist after the statement period

sonuc.mutabik: Result: We're reconciled ✓ Our records match exactly.
sonuc.fark_aciklandi: Result: There's a difference and the cause is clear — explained below.
sonuc.bakiye_teyitsiz: Result: I compared the statement but couldn't pin down the balance; let's check the items below together.
sonuc.mutabik_degil: Result: We're not reconciled — let's review the differences below together.

share.devirIste: The {{amount}} difference comes from before {{date}}. Could you send the statement for the period before {{date}}?
share.baslangicIste: I'm looking into the {{amount}} difference; let's check together starting from the earliest period.
share.bizdeEksikBaslik: {{count}} entries on your statement I don't have (if you share the proof/invoice I'll check and record them):
share.onlardaEksikBaslik: {{count}} entries I have that aren't on your statement — likely invoices or payments/collections you missed. Could you check?
share.tutarBaslik: {{count}} entries showing a different amount on each side:
share.gorunmeyenDonem: The transactions in this statement line up but a {{amount}} difference remains; I think the issue is in an older period. Could you share a full/older statement if possible?
share.bakiyeReferans: As of {{date}}, the balance on my side: {{ours}}
share.footer: — Prepared with the İşletme Takip app 📘
